html:
Exclusive to:

“Heals 8 Health and then 20 more Health over 1 minute.”

-

Tillweed Salve is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Return of Them update.

When used, Tillweed Salve restores 8 initially, as well as an additional 20 over 1 minute.

Skill Tree (Walter)

Field Medic

Walter with the "Field Medic" skill will use the item 50% faster and restore 12 .

Trivia

  • The Tillweed Salve was introduced in the Reap What You Sow update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Miscellaneous
"tillweedsalve"
“My salve-ation.”
–Wilson
“I guess that weed was good for something.”
–Willow
“Feels nice on the boo-boos.”
–Wolfgang
“A balm to ease my suffering.”
–Wendy
“THIS GROSS ORGANIC PASTE WILL SPEED UP MY REPAIRS”
–WX-78
“The Tillweed's roots appear to have limited healing capabilities.”
–Wickerbottom
“Never hurts to have some of this stuff around.”
–Woodie
“This will have to do.”
–Maxwell
“Hmm, it döth appear that föul weed has a use after all.”
–Wigfrid
“It helps get rid of booboos.”
–Webber
“Those weeds turned out to be a useful ingredient after all.”
–Warly
“Thank you friends!”
–Wormwood
“Glad to have found a use for those weeds.”
–Winona
“A welcome break from pains and aches.”
–Wortox
“See? Weeds more useful than flowers.”
–Wurt
“Even weeds can be helpful in the wilderness!”
–Walter
“This plant gunk isn't going to do me much good.”
–Wanda
“Heals 8 Health and then 20 more Health over 1 minute.”
-
Tillweed Salve is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Return of Them update.
When used, Tillweed Salve restores 8 initially, as well as an additional 20 over 1 minute.
Skill Tree (Walter)[edit | edit source]
Field Medic[edit | edit source]
Walter with the "Field Medic" skill will use the item 50% faster and restore 12 .
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Tillweed Salve was introduced in the Reap What You Sow update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tillweed Salve là một Vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật Return of Them.
title: Tillweed Salve
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}

'''Tillweed Salve''' is an [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in the ''[[Return of Them]]'' update.

When used, Tillweed Salve restores 8 {{hp}} initially, as well as an additional 20 {{hp}} over 1 minute.

=={{pic|48|Insight}} Skill Tree (Walter)==
==={{PicDark|32|Field Medic}}Field Medic===
[[Walter]] with the "[[Field Medic]]" skill will use the item 50% faster and restore 12 {{hp}}.

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Tillweed Salve was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Reap What You Sow|Reap What You Sow]]'' update.

{{Craftable Items}}

[[Category:Healing Filter]]
